description_long: This sculpture features a large, circular wheel-like form with six spokes radiating from the center, all crafted from what appears to be weathered metal. The structure is supported by two sturdy rectangular legs, each anchored to a concrete or stone base set on a patch of grass. The surface of the sculpture is marked with graffiti and inscriptions, giving it an urban, well-used appearance. The metal has a rusty, reddish-brown patina, suggesting exposure to the elements over time. The open design allows for visibility through the spokes, casting intricate shadows on the ground. The overall impression is of an abstract, industrial-inspired public artwork.
description: A large, rust-colored metal wheel sculpture with six spokes, supported by two rectangular legs on a grassy base, featuring graffiti and weathered textures.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full circular wheel with six spokes and both supporting legs, as well as visible graffiti and inscriptions.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the sculpture's thin profile and the depth of the wheel, with the supporting legs and base visible in alignment.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the wheel and legs, with the open spokes and graffiti still visible, and the grassy base more prominent.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again highlights the sculpture's thinness and the shadow it casts on the grass, with less detail of the inscriptions.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is installed outdoors on a grassy patch, likely in a park or open urban space.
